# DataJournalism.Studio

> Data journalism tools, election analysis, and forensic studies. Specialized in electoral systems, real-time predictions, and data-driven political analysis.

## About

DataJournalism.Studio is a platform for data journalism focusing on electoral analysis, political forecasting, and data visualization. We develop innovative tools for understanding elections and political processes.

- Website: https://www.datajournalism.studio
- Authors: Kateřina Mahdalová, Michal Škop
- Focus: electoral analysis, data journalism tools, political forecasting

## Main Sections

### Election Analysis
https://www.datajournalism.studio/blog
In-depth analysis of elections worldwide using data science and statistical methods.

### Tools & Models
https://www.datajournalism.studio/work
Interactive tools for election predictions, forensic analysis, and data visualization.

### About Us
https://www.datajournalism.studio/about
Information about our methodology, team, and approach to data journalism.

## Featured Work

### Election Models & Predictions
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/unique-election-model
  Unique methodology for election forecasting and real-time predictions
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/elections-real-time-predictions
  Real-time election prediction systems
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/czech-elections-2025-10-04-predictions
  Czech parliamentary elections 2025 predictions
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/2024-10-31-volebni-model
  Electoral model methodology (Czech)

### Election Forensics
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/elections-forensic-analysis
  Statistical methods for detecting electoral irregularities
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/2024-07-08-electoral-forensic-case-study
  Case study in electoral forensic analysis

### International Elections
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/2024-11-06-USA-volby
  US Presidential Elections 2024 analysis
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/canada-elections-2025-04-29-how-trump-resurrected-liberals
  Canadian elections 2025: How Trump resurrected the Liberals
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/2024-12-20-Rumunsko-volby-EU
  Romania elections and EU implications
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/2024-11-27-austria-cartogram
  Austria election results visualization

### Data Visualization
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/elections-maps-of-results
  Interactive maps of election results

### Investigative Analysis
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/2025-05-20-money-from-nowhere-the-mysterious-millions-of-mep-turek
  Investigation: The mysterious millions of MEP Turek
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/analysis-2026-03-18-lawmakers-want-stricter-ngo-oversight
  Analysis of NGO oversight legislation
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/analysis-2026-04-02-who-profits-from-expensive-gasoline
  Economic analysis: Who profits from expensive gasoline

### Media & Disinformation
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/2024-11-14-Amsterdam-video
  Context analysis: Amsterdam video incident

### Education & Research
- https://www.datajournalism.studio/a/2024-10-17-za-sevcika-se-rekordne-propadl-zajem-uchazecu-o-studium-nejvic-ze-vsech-verejnych-vysokych-skol-v-cr
  Analysis: Record drop in university applications

## Methodology

Our work combines:
- Statistical modeling and machine learning
- Real-time data processing
- Electoral forensics
- Data visualization
- Fact-checking and verification

## Contact

- Email: info@datajournalism.studio
- GitHub: https://github.com/michalskop
- Support our work: https://www.datajournalism.studio/about
